snippet: Dear Mrs. Worms, Good afternoon. I checked the electricity meter by switching off the power in my apartment and I discovered that my apartment is not bus 6 but bus 5. It seems that the apartment number
subject: Correction of apartment number in contract
body:
Dear Mrs. Worms,

Good afternoon.

I checked the electricity meter by switching off the power in my apartment
and I discovered that my apartment is not bus 6 but bus 5.

It seems that the apartment number in the contract may be incorrect. Could
you please verify this?

Also, for the meter readings, we should use the meters corresponding to bus
5.

Thank you in advance for your clarification.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov
